ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Pistachio nut, grilled, no added salt
Cashew nut, dry-grilled, no added salt
Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients_text: Sugar 26.96%, flour 21%, pistachio 15.14%, vegetable ghee 13.79%, cashew 13.1%, starch 6.1%, water 3.03%, salt 0.52%, full cream milk powder 0.36%.
